chain.thought: Explanation: Participants with the status "DNPQ" (did not pre-qualify) were required to complete pre-qualifying before starting the race. Since they did not start, the "time/retired" field is blank, meaning no finish time was recorded.

judge_thought: Explanation: The condition “finish before they started” is impossible within a race context and not represented in the table. Entrants who did not start (DNS) or did not qualify/pre-qualify have no finish time recorded. Therefore, the finish time would be not applicable (n/a).
